summary: Iteration 66 - Client-facing Vehicle Listing & Detail Page UI/UX Testing. All core features verified working: 3-column grid layout, premium vehicle cards, filter pills, search, vehicle detail page with photo gallery, specs, conditions, reviews, booking buttons. One issue found: data-testid attributes not rendering in DOM (React Native Web limitation).

issues: data-testid attributes (vehicle-card-{id}, details-btn-{id}, reserve-btn-{id}) not rendering in DOM - React Native Web limitation. Photo click and text-based selectors work as alternatives.

critical_code_review_comments: VehicleCard.tsx: Premium card design correctly implemented with photo, status badge, brand/year, model, specs, price, Details and Reserver buttons
vehicles.tsx: 3-column grid on desktop, filter pills (Tous, SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire) working, search bar filters by name
[id].tsx: Vehicle detail page has all required elements - photo gallery with counter, urgency badges, brand/model/year, specs grid, conditions, reviews, booking card with CTAs
Navigation: Photo click -> /vehicle/{id} (WORKS), Details button -> /vehicle/{id} (WORKS via goDetail), Reserver button -> /booking/{id} (WORKS), Back button -> /vehicles (WORKS)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client-facing vehicle listing and detail pages fully tested. All features working: 3-column grid, filter pills, search, vehicle detail page with photo gallery, specs, conditions, reviews, booking buttons. Reviews are MOCKED (hardcoded data). Urgency badges use random numbers.

vehicles_listing_page.filter_pills: PASS - Tous, SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire all clickable and filter vehicles
vehicles_listing_page.search_bar: PASS - Search filters vehicles by name (tested with 'Tesla')
vehicles_listing_page.vehicle_cards: PASS - Premium cards with photo, status badge, brand/year, model, specs, price, Details/Reserver buttons

vehicle_detail_page.photo_gallery: PASS - Main photo with counter (1/1), click opens fullscreen modal
vehicle_detail_page.urgency_badges: PASS - 'X reservations cette semaine', 'Plus que X disponibles' (MOCKED with random numbers)
vehicle_detail_page.brand_model_year: PASS - Brand · Year format, large model name
vehicle_detail_page.specs_grid: PASS - 6 specs: seats, transmission, fuel, year, type, color
vehicle_detail_page.conditions: PASS - Age minimum (21 ans), Caution (CHF 1'500), Permis (B valide depuis 2 ans), Assurance, Km inclus
vehicle_detail_page.booking_card: PASS - Price (CHF X /jour), 'Reserver maintenant' button, 'Voir la disponibilite' button
vehicle_detail_page.trust_badges: PASS - Assurance incluse, Annulation gratuite, Confirmation instantanee

navigation.photo_click_to_detail: PASS - Clicking vehicle photo navigates to /vehicle/{id}

mocked_features.reviews: Hardcoded 3 reviews with names (Marc D., Sophie L., Pierre M.), ratings, and text
mocked_features.urgency_badges: Random numbers for 'X reservations cette semaine' and 'Plus que X disponibles'

playwright_tests_performed: Test filter pills (SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire, Tous)
Click vehicle photo to navigate to detail page
Verify all detail page elements (photo, urgency badges, specs, conditions, reviews, booking card)
Test 'Reserver maintenant' button navigation to booking page
Test 'Voir la disponibilite' button navigation to booking page
Test 'Retour' back button navigation to vehicles page
